1

engineering maths學

complex number

Eigenvalue, eigenvector

first order diff equation (separating variable, linear equation)

second order diff equation (non homogenous 2nd order diff equation with constant coefficient)

laplace transform

partial derivatives
(Lagrange multiplier, directional derivatives，chain rule, implicit differentiation)

上YouTube打翻以上嘅keyword學，好過睇notes 自修
